protocol_notes: Uses Humapen insulin pens with 3ml cartridges for peptide storage and delivery. Reconstitutes each peptide vial with 3ml bacteriostatic water. Stores cartridges in fridge; keeps non-reconstituted peptides in freezer. Prepares cartridges as needed, not months in advance, given 20-30 day post-reconstitution window. Each peptide has its own labeled Humapen. Dosing examples provided: CJC-1295 MOD GRF 1-29 2mg vial at 100mcg dose (15 UI per dose, 20 doses per cartridge); Ipamorelin 5mg vial at 250mcg dose (15 UI per dose, 20 doses per cartridge); Semax 5mg vial at 500mcg dose (30 UI per dose, 10 doses per cartridge).
